name: ALSO Holding AG
summary: ALSO Holding AG operates as a service provider for the ICT industry. The company offers various ICT product categories of hardware, software, and information technology (IT) services. It also provides customized services in the logistics, finance, IT, and digital services sectors, as well as traditional distribution services. The company serves retailers, etailers, small and medium-sized business resellers, value-added resellers, corporate resellers, and integrators. It has operations in Switzerland, Germany, the Netherlands, and internationally. The company was formerly known as ALSO-Actebis Holding AG and changed its name to ALSO Holding AG in March 2013. The company was founded in 1984 and is headquartered in Emmen, Switzerland. ALSO Holding AG is a subsidiary of Droege Group AG.
